summary: Modern digital clock style countdown timer component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/countdown-digital/src/CountdownDigital.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CountdownDigital` and `countdownDigitalDefaultProps`, then register the `CountdownDigital` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Countdown Digital Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/countdown-digital to my project. Preserve the exported CountdownDigitalProps API and register the CountdownDigital composition with the default props.
